## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss legal concerns and strategies for Marcel's startup, focusing on lawyer selection and founder equity arrangements.](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current lawyer (Albert) raising concerns; considering second opinion or switching firms](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Exploring options to protect Daniel's (co-founder) equity position and tax implications](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Time spent on legal matters impacting business growth; est. $300-400k ARR loss per week](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Considering hiring in-house general counsel by June due to increasing legal complexities](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)

## Topics

### Legal Representation Concerns

  - [Albert (current lawyer) perceived as scatterbrained and difficult to follow](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Unusual recommendations raising flags with VCs and other counsel](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Marcel used ChatGPT to analyze terms, flagging potential issues](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Considering second opinion or switching to a more established firm like Goodwin](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
  - [Karun suggested switching to Goodwin post-round closure, negotiating a discount](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)

### Founder Equity Structure

  - [Daniel exploring options for more favorable equity arrangement](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Current option structure problematic: high exercise costs (\~$500-600k/year in taxes)](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Seeking protection against scenarios where founders can't exercise options](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Ideal: Both founders start with owned shares (70/30 split) + vesting, no exercise needed](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Meeting with Jesse Berg tomorrow for second opinion on equity options](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

### Business Impact of Legal Delays

  - [Marcel estimates $300-400k ARR loss per week due to missed sales meetings](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Concerns about deal momentum: "when you linger, then it's like, Oh, you know, like, and then it's like, goes away"](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Desire to focus on high-value activities (sales, operations) instead of legal matters](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)

### Future Legal Strategy

  - [Plan to hire in-house general counsel by June](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Anticipating increased legal needs: potential M\&As, multiple brands, AI model training](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Aiming to establish protections early to mitigate future vulnerabilities](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Concerns about freelancer risks: 20 contractors with access to client data, including public companies](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)

### Streamlining Communication

  - [Marcel proposing daily stand-ups with Bridget to manage legal/admin tasks](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Too many email threads causing confusion and inefficiency](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Suggestion to move all related emails to a separate folder for better organization](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule meeting with Jesse Berg for second opinion on equity options](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Explore engaging Goodwin or another T1 firm that has recently handled major funding rounds](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Consider slowing down the process by a week to potentially switch legal representation](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
  - [Implement daily stand-ups between Marcel and Bridget to streamline communication](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Continue exploring in-house general counsel options for June hiring target](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Address freelancer access and security concerns as a priority](https://fathom.video/share/cKDZyWB_s2a8C9vWzKsyYTCGzbP7rg4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
